---
title: "Rafael Lopes"
image: yale_profile2.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/rafael-lopes-px/"
    - text: 🦋 Bluesky
      url: "https://www.bsky.app/rafalpx"
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/rafalopespx"
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:lopes1313@gmail.com"
    - text: CV
      url: "CV_Rafael_Lopes.pdf"
comments: false
---
::: {.column-page}

## Bio

I’m a computational epidemiologist at Yale University, working on climate change impact into infectious diseases.
By training I'm either a physicist (specializing in mathematical and statistical modelling for disease transmission and spread) or 
environmental and climate epidemiologist; professionally, I've worked
as a data scientist and barista. I like drawing [maps](south_ameria_cell_towers_no_borders_no_caption_no_title.png)!

On this site I keep a list of [my CV](CV_Rafael_Lopes.pdf)

<p></p>

## Selected Projects

#### R Packages

**[nowcaster](https://github.com/covid19br/nowcaster)** | Nowcasting to delay correction to epidemiological data.

:::

<link rel="me" href="https://www.bsky.app/rafalpx">
